content.tagline: Precision Cutting and Fabrication for Marine Industry
content.about:
Advanced Waterjet Solutions is Fort Lauderdale's premier provider of precision waterjet and laser cutting services for the marine industry and beyond. Located at 3309 SW 11th Ave in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, we bring cutting-edge technology and over 20 years of expertise to every custom metal fabrication project we take on. Whether you're a boat builder in Broward County or a yacht owner in Palm Beach, we deliver the kind of accuracy and craftsmanship that demanding marine applications require.

Our facility specializes in custom welding and fabrication work built specifically for the marine environment. From structural steel and aluminum welding to stainless steel component fabrication, we handle projects that require tight tolerances and materials that can stand up to saltwater conditions. We work with MIG, TIG, and stick welding processes across a wide range of metals, producing everything from custom brackets and frames to complex assemblies for commercial and recreational vessels alike. Our waterjet and laser cutting capabilities allow us to cut intricate shapes with precision that sets the foundation for clean, strong welds every time.

We serve boat builders, yacht manufacturers, marine repair shops, and vessel owners throughout South Florida — from Fort Lauderdale and Miami-Dade County up through Palm Beach and the surrounding coastal communities. Our clients come to us because they need fast turnaround times without sacrificing quality. Whether it's a one-off custom part or a production run for a boatyard, we treat every project with the same attention to detail. If it floats and it needs metal work done right, we're the shop South Florida turns to.
content.seoTitle: Advanced Waterjet Solutions | Welding & Fabrication Fort Lauderdale, FL
content.seoDescription: Custom marine welding & fabrication in Fort Lauderdale, FL. Serving South Florida boat builders & yacht owners. Call Advanced Waterjet Solutions today.
seoKeywords: stainless steel marine fabrication Broward County

serviceDescriptions.Welding & Fabrication: Advanced Waterjet Solutions provides precision marine welding and custom metal fabrication using MIG, TIG, and stick welding processes across aluminum, stainless steel, and structural steel. From custom brackets and structural frames to complex multi-component assemblies, every weld is built to handle the demands of saltwater marine environments. Tight tolerances and clean fitment are the standard — not the exception.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Based in Fort Lauderdale, FL, Advanced Waterjet Solutions serves boat builders, marinas, and vessel owners across South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Custom aluminum bracket and frame fabrication for recreational vessels
Stainless steel railing and hardware fabrication for yacht refits
Structural welding repairs on commercial and charter boat hulls
Custom engine mount and machinery bed fabrication for marine vessels
Precision waterjet-cut parts for boat builders and marine manufacturers
Custom swim platform and transom fabrication for sportfishing boats
One-off component fabrication for marine repair shops and boatyards

reviewSynopsis.summary: Our clients know they can count on us when it matters most — we've bailed customers out of tough situations on more than one occasion, and we take pride in making that happen. We're consistently recognized for being easy to work with and delivering some of the fastest turnaround times in the industry. With a 4.6 out of 5 rating across 10 reviews, our customers' experiences speak to the reliability and efficiency we bring to every project.
